summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 20 REST API tests passed. Socket.IO game loop is running and emitting events internally. Xeris blockchain proxy endpoints working correctly.

minor.issue: Supervisor config uses server:app instead of server:socket_asgi_app - Socket.IO may not work via external URL. Game loop runs internally but external WebSocket connections may fail.

action_items: OPTIONAL: If Socket.IO external connections fail, the supervisor config needs to use server:socket_asgi_app instead of server:app. However, this file is marked as READONLY.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
Provably fair crash point generation using HMAC is correctly implemented
Xeris proxy endpoints correctly handle Mixed Content bypass
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded from responses using projection {'_id': 0}
seed_data_creation: Test wallets created during testing with prefix TEST_ pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: All REST API endpoints verified working. Socket.IO game loop runs internally but external WebSocket testing was not possible due to supervisor config using server:app instead of server:socket_asgi_app. The game history shows crash points being generated correctly.

tested_endpoints.GET /api/wallet/{address}: PASS - Returns wallet details, 404 for non-existent
tested_endpoints.GET /api/game/state: PASS - Returns current game state with multiplier
tested_endpoints.GET /api/game/history: PASS - Returns game history with crash points
tested_endpoints.GET /api/leaderboard: PASS - Returns leaderboard (empty if no winners)
tested_endpoints.GET /api/xeris/balance/{address}: PASS - Proxies to Xeris node, returns balance
